---
title: "Western Blot — Sep 2025"
subtitle: "Tau & Actin: composite figure and quantification"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r libraries}
library(magick)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
```

# Western Blot Images

```{r build-composites}
# ── Read band images ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
tau_soma  <- image_read("ImagesTif/ELINA_2025-09-03_12h27m08s_DyLight_800_tau-soma.tif")
tau_axon  <- image_read("ImagesTif/ELINA_2025-09-03_12h27m08s_DyLight_800_tau-axons.tif")
act_soma  <- image_read("ImagesTif/ELINA_2025-09-03_14h40m53s_DyLight_800_actin-soma.tif")
act_axon  <- image_read("ImagesTif/ELINA_2025-09-03_14h40m53s_DyLight_800_actin-axons.tif")

# ── Layout constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PANEL_W   <- 500L   # width of the band image area
LEFT_W    <- 72L    # left margin: kDa labels
RIGHT_W   <- 80L    # right margin: protein name
TOTAL_W   <- LEFT_W + PANEL_W + RIGHT_W
HEADER_H  <- 38L    # lane-label row height
GAP_H     <- 10L    # gap between tau and actin rows
FS        <- 15L    # base font size
BG        <- "white"

# ── Resize panels to uniform width ────────────────────────────────────────────
fit_w <- function(img) {
  h <- as.integer(round(image_info(img)$height *
                        PANEL_W / image_info(img)$width))
  image_resize(img, paste0(PANEL_W, "x", h, "!"))
}

tau_soma <- fit_w(tau_soma); tau_axon <- fit_w(tau_axon)
act_soma <- fit_w(act_soma); act_axon <- fit_w(act_axon)

# ── Add black border around a band panel ──────────────────────────────────────
add_border <- function(img, thickness = 2L) {
  image_border(img, "black", paste0(thickness, "x", thickness))
  # image_border adds to both sides, so subtract to keep PANEL_W
  # → just use border without resizing; the 2px difference is negligible
}

tau_soma <- add_border(tau_soma)
tau_axon <- add_border(tau_axon)
act_soma <- add_border(act_soma)
act_axon <- add_border(act_axon)

# ── Build one labelled band row ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# [kDa left strip | band panel | protein name right strip]
make_row <- function(img, kda_label, protein_label) {
  h <- image_info(img)$height

  left <- image_blank(LEFT_W, h, color = BG) |>
    image_annotate(kda_label,
                   size = FS - 1, color = "black", font = "sans",
                   gravity = "West", location = "+4+0")

  right <- image_blank(RIGHT_W, h, color = BG) |>
    image_annotate(protein_label,
                   size = FS, color = "black", font = "sans",
                   style = "italic", gravity = "West", location = "+6+0")

  image_append(c(left, img, right), stack = FALSE)
}

# ── Build lane-header row ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_header <- function(labels = c("Ctrl", "ProNGF\n30 min",
                                   "ProNGF\n45 min", "ProNGF\n60 min")) {
  header <- image_blank(TOTAL_W, HEADER_H, color = BG)
  col_w  <- PANEL_W / length(labels)
  for (i in seq_along(labels)) {
    x <- LEFT_W + as.integer((i - 1L) * col_w + col_w / 2L) - 28L
    header <- image_annotate(header, labels[i],
                             size = FS - 1, color = "black",
                             font = "sans", weight = 700,
                             gravity = "NorthWest",
                             location = paste0("+", x, "+4"))
  }
  header
}

gap <- image_blank(TOTAL_W, GAP_H, color = BG)

# ── Build composite for one compartment ───────────────────────────────────────
build_composite <- function(tau_img, act_img, title_label) {
  title_row <- image_blank(TOTAL_W, 28L, color = BG) |>
    image_annotate(title_label,
                   size = FS + 1, color = "black",
                   font = "sans", weight = 700,
                   gravity = "NorthWest",
                   location = paste0("+", LEFT_W, "+4"))

  row_tau  <- make_row(tau_img, "56 kDa", "Tau")
  row_actin <- make_row(act_img, "42 kDa", "Actin")

  comp <- image_append(
    c(title_row, make_header(), row_tau, gap, row_actin),
    stack = TRUE
  )
  image_border(comp, BG, "8x8")
}

soma_composite <- build_composite(tau_soma, act_soma, "Soma")
axon_composite <- build_composite(tau_axon, act_axon, "Axon")

# ── Save PNGs for external use ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
image_write(soma_composite, "WB_soma_Sep2025.png", format = "png", density = 300)
image_write(axon_composite, "WB_axon_Sep2025.png", format = "png", density = 300)
```

## Soma

```{r show-soma, fig.align="center"}
soma_composite
```

## Axon

```{r show-axon, fig.align="center"}
axon_composite
```

---

# Quantification

```{r quant-setup}
# ── Load data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lane_map  <- read_csv("ImagesTif/LaneMapping_ExperimentSep25.csv")
actin_raw <- read_csv("ImagesTif/Sep03_DyLight800_actin.csv") |>
  rename(Lane = 1, Actin = Area)
tau_raw   <- read_csv("ImagesTif/Sep03_DyLight800_tau.csv") |>
  rename(Lane = 1, Tau = Area)

df <- lane_map |>
  left_join(tau_raw,   by = "Lane") |>
  left_join(actin_raw, by = "Lane") |>
  mutate(
    Tau_Actin   = Tau / Actin,
    Condition   = factor(Condition,
                         levels = c("Ctrl", "ProNGF 30min",
                                    "ProNGF 45min", "ProNGF 60min")),
    Compartment = factor(Compartment, levels = c("Soma", "Axon"))
  )

theme_wb <- function() {
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = 11),
      plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey45"),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
      legend.position    = "none"
    )
}

pal <- c(Soma = "#4A90D9", Axon = "#E07B54")
```

## Tau / Actin Ratio

Normalised tau signal (Tau ÷ Actin) for each condition. Soma and Axon are
shown side-by-side for direct comparison.

```{r plot-ratio, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot(df, aes(x = Condition, y = Tau_Actin, fill = Compartment)) +
  geom_col(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.65),
    width    = 0.6,
    color    = "white"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  labs(
    title    = "Tau / Actin ratio by condition and compartment",
    subtitle = "Single replicate — no statistical comparison shown",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Tau / Actin (a.u.)",
    fill     = "Compartment"
  ) +
  theme_wb() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```

## Raw Quantification

### Actin

```{r plot-actin, fig.width=10, fig.height=4.5}
y_max_actin <- max(df$Actin, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15

p_soma_actin <- df |>
  filter(Compartment == "Soma") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Condition, y = Actin, fill = Compartment)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)),
                     limits = c(0, y_max_actin)) +
  labs(title = "Soma — Actin", x = NULL, y = "Band intensity (a.u.)") +
  theme_wb()

p_axon_actin <- df |>
  filter(Compartment == "Axon") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Condition, y = Actin, fill = Compartment)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)),
                     limits = c(0, y_max_actin)) +
  labs(title = "Axon — Actin", x = NULL, y = "Band intensity (a.u.)") +
  theme_wb()

p_soma_actin + p_axon_actin +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Raw Actin signal",
    subtitle = "Y-axes share the same scale for cross-compartment comparison"
  )
```

### Tau

```{r plot-tau, fig.width=10, fig.height=4.5}
y_max_tau <- max(df$Tau, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15

p_soma_tau <- df |>
  filter(Compartment == "Soma") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Condition, y = Tau, fill = Compartment)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)),
                     limits = c(0, y_max_tau)) +
  labs(title = "Soma — Tau", x = NULL, y = "Band intensity (a.u.)") +
  theme_wb()

p_axon_tau <- df |>
  filter(Compartment == "Axon") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Condition, y = Tau, fill = Compartment)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)),
                     limits = c(0, y_max_tau)) +
  labs(title = "Axon — Tau", x = NULL, y = "Band intensity (a.u.)") +
  theme_wb()

p_soma_tau + p_axon_tau +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Raw Tau signal",
    subtitle = "Y-axes share the same scale for cross-compartment comparison"
  )
```

---

## Data Table

```{r data-table}
df |>
  select(Lane, Condition, Compartment, Tau, Actin, Tau_Actin) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), \(x) round(x, 3))) |>
  knitr::kable(
    col.names = c("Lane", "Condition", "Compartment",
                  "Tau (a.u.)", "Actin (a.u.)", "Tau/Actin"),
    align = "llcrrr"
  )
```
